title: Reconnection
text: The SBI vibrates in your hand. The Organization's modification is active.
[KAEDA] "Ready. Now, when you fight in the LDI, we receive the data."
She hands you a digital token.
[KAEDA] "Each battle of yours is a cover. While everyone watches the arena, we pull the system files."
You connect the token. A new interface appears on your display.
[SYSTEM] "Anomalous Code Active. Collection Mode initialized."
Kaeda crosses her arms.
[KAEDA] "Welcome to the real work."

choices.label: Start the first day of collection

title: Day 8 — First Collection
text: The violet sun of the LDI brightens the digital horizon.
You wake up in the Organization's cube. Kaeda is already at the terminal.
[KAEDA] "Today is arena day. We need battle data to cross-reference with the system logs."
[KAEDA] "But if you want to do something else first, the choice is yours. Just don't forget: we need results."
What do you do today?

choices.label: ⚔️ Battle in the Arena — main collection

title: Investigating the Terminals
text: You spend the morning at the LDI public terminals.
The access logs reveal strange patterns — someone with employee credentials is accessing player data outside business hours.
You find a repeated username: ENG_INTEGRITY_47.
Never seen before. But the access level is high.
[KAEDA — text message] "Good work. That's a clue."
You register the discovery in the Organization's notebook. +1 clue.

choices.label: End the day — go back to the shelter

title: Freelancer Work
text: You spend the day making deliveries in the MDR.
The work is manual, but it pays the bills. And the Week is coming.
At the end of the day, you have 120 more credits in your pocket.
No clues today. But the Collection continues tomorrow.

title: Rest Day
text: You spend the day in the cube, recovering your energy.
Kaeda doesn't complain — she knows investigation is a marathon, not a sprint.
HP and MP fully recovered.
Tomorrow there's more.

title: Day 9 — Second Collection
text: Another day in the LDI. The routine is starting to make sense.
Kaeda is at the terminal when you wake up.
[KAEDA] "We received more data from the arena yesterday. The pattern confirms: someone on the inside is manipulating results."
[KAEDA] "We need more evidence. Today, try to pull information from another angle."
What do you do?

title: Conversations in the Square
text: You hang around the corners of Central Square, listening to conversations.
A data merchant mentions something interesting:
"Ever notice how mid-rank fights have been weird? People losing when they should win. Like someone's been messing with the results."
You take notes. This confirms what the Organization suspects.
+1 clue: ranking manipulation report.
[KAEDA — message] "This matches the logs. Getting close."

title: SBI Examination
text: You spend hours analyzing the modified code on your SBI.
The Organization's modification is elegant — it creates a parallel data tunnel during battles, invisible to the main system.
But something catches your attention: there are traces of ANOTHER prior modification. Something that wasn't placed by the Organization.
Something that came from the factory.
+1 clue: anomaly in the SBI base code.
This is bigger than you thought.

title: Day 10 — Cross-referencing Data
text: Kaeda receives you with a different expression. Something has changed.
[KAEDA] "I got partial access to Yohualticit's internal logs."
She turns the terminal toward you.
[KAEDA] "The user ENG_INTEGRITY_47 is a real employee. Systems Integrity Engineer."
[KAEDA] "Real name: protected by NDA. But we have the title."
Integrity Engineer. The person responsible for detecting fraud in the system.
The watcher is the thief.
What do you do with this information?

choices.label: Try to access the employee's data 🧩

title: 🧩 Terminal Breach
text: You try to access Yohualticit's corporate terminal.
The security system is heavy. You need to decode the access.
The terminal displays a security puzzle — slide the tiles to rearrange the access pattern.
[SYSTEM] "Access denied. Attempt registered."
You have one chance before the alert is sent.

choices.label: Give up — go back to the shelter

title: No Access
text: You couldn't get past the terminal's security.
But the clues you already have are enough to continue.
Kaeda nods when you come back.
[KAEDA] "No problem. We'll work with what we have."

title: Access Granted
text: The system yields. You're in.
The Integrity Engineer's files are partially accessible.
Name: protected. But you find something better: a credit transfer log.
Recurring payments to unofficial accounts. On the days of the suspicious fights.
This is the proof the Organization needs.
+1 clue: financial record of the manipulation.
You copy the data and leave before the alert triggers.

choices.label: Return to the shelter with the data

title: Day 11 — The Pattern Emerges
text: With the clues collected, a pattern begins to form.
ENG_INTEGRITY_47 accesses the system every night between 11 PM and 2 AM.
The suspicious fights always happen in the following 2 hours.
And the payments go out the next day.
Kaeda is excited — and tense.
[KAEDA] "We have a name, a title, and a pattern. Now we need the face."
[KAEDA] "And there's a way to get it."

title: Day 12 — The Plan
text: [KAEDA] "We schedule a fight at the time he messes with the system. When he logs in, you pull his data."
[KAEDA] "The modified SBI can capture the digital signature of whoever is tampering with the system during battle."
She leans on the table.
[KAEDA] "If it works, we get the real name. If it doesn't... he'll know someone's investigating."
You accept. It's the best shot.

choices.label: Ask for a day to better prepare

title: Preparation Day
text: You spend the day training and reviewing the plan with Kaeda.
She adjusts the SBI. Tests the signature capture.
[KAEDA] "The tool works. It just needs you in the arena at the right moment."
The next day, there's no more excuse.

title: Signature Captured
text: The battle ends. Your SBI vibrates.
[SYSTEM] "Digital signature captured. Processing..."
Kaeda's voice comes through the comms:
[KAEDA] "Got it! We have the bastard!"
The display shows a name:
NULL_ENTITY — ALIAS: ENG_INTEGRITY_47 — REAL NAME: [CLASSIFIED]
The real name is still locked behind Yohualticit encryption. But now you know his digital face.
[KAEDA] "This is enough to move forward. Let's go."
The final phase is about to begin.
